SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PHRMCY_SRVC_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: 01 = Community/retail pharmacy 
02 = Compounding pharmacy 
03 = Home infusion therapy provider 
04 = Institutional pharmacy 
05 = Long-term care pharmacy 
06 = Mail order pharmacy
